suppress.notes: CVE-2026-54515 is fixed in com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind 2.21.5/2.22.1, but those patched 2.x artifacts are not currently resolvable from Maven Central. The vulnerable 2.x Jackson line is pulled in transitively by springdoc-openapi/swagger while Spring Boot 4 also provides the patched tools.jackson 3.1.4 line. Remove this suppression once springdoc/swagger or a resolvable com.fasterxml.jackson patched version is available.

wiremock-standalone 3.13.2 shades its runtime dependencies, so Gradle cannot override the affected embedded libraries directly. Maven Central has no newer stable 3.x wiremock-standalone release and WireMock 4 is still beta. Remove this suppression and upgrade to the stable WireMock 4 standalone artifact once available.
